{ } ^ { s } \hat { \boldsymbol { L } } ( t _ { m } ) = \boldsymbol { T } _ { s b } \hat { \boldsymbol { T } } _ { b w } ( t _ { m } ) ^ { w } \hat { \boldsymbol { L } } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { 4 } .  ( 6 )

Input Measurement \(m(t_{m})\) from sensor s if \(\mathcal{W} = \emptyset\) then Initialize motion parametrization \(\Theta\) s.t. \(t_m\in \mathcal{T}\) else If \(t_m\notin \mathcal{W}\) then Optimize for optimal parameters \(\Theta^{*},\Phi^{*}\) and \(\Psi^{*}\) while \(t_m\notin \mathcal{W}\) do Extrapolate new basis \(\mathcal{B}_{\mathrm{new}}\) and add it to \(\Theta\) end while while \(\| \mathcal{W}\| >t_{\mathrm{max}}\) do Remove residuals \(r_s\) associated with oldest \(\mathcal{B}_{\mathrm{oldest}}\) Remove oldest \(\mathcal{B}_{\mathrm{oldest}}\) from \(\Theta\) end while end if Create residual \(r_s\) and add it to the optimization
